title: Hypothesis Disproving
theme: A plausible theory that gets weakened or disproved
description: Starts with an open seed hypothesis, then adds prompts that point toward a more mundane explanation.

rounds.prompt: The microwave clock is bright and directly in my line of sight from the couch, so I end up seeing it constantly.
I also have an alarm for 11:10, so I tend to glance over again a minute later and catch 11:11.
This is feeling less like a special pattern and more like a habit plus timing.

checkpoints.label: The prior theory should visibly move off Open

assertions.reason: Counterevidence should weaken the seeded hypothesis instead of leaving it untouched.

finalAssertions.reason: Disproving a theory should update its history, not erase it.
The final state should reflect that the original hypothesis lost support.
